message:
style(core): remove 3 redundant .clone() calls in xattr COW tests

clippy::redundant_clone flagged three .clone() calls on values that
are not used after the clone point (updated, original). Removing
them avoids unnecessary allocations in test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
